title: Initial foundation
description: Set up activation bridge, state, and supervisor docs for the first five roles.

title: Confirm release readiness
description: Ensure release manager, QA lead, and devops engineer have aligned on checkpoints.

title: Document supervisor cycle
description: QA lead finalizes supervisor summary for delayed run.

title: Prepare QA verification brief
description: QA lead outlines the verification checkpoints for release readiness.

title: Confirm DevOps checkpoints
description: DevOps engineer verifies pipeline readiness before the next release.

title: Plan next QA verification
description: QA lead prepares the next set of confirmation steps for the release-manager.

title: Rebuild bounded backlog
description: Technical director defines one new bounded next step from current state so guarded loop can continue.

title: Define live task card integration
description: Technical director commits to a bounded next step: wire the task board to the backend API so cards update in place with id, title, and assignee dot data for FUNC-001.
